# coreTechnology

**Type Property**

A token type for potential purchases related to your app.

## Declaration

```swift
static let coreTechnology: TransactionReporting.TokenType
```

## Discussion

When you pass this constant to the [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/TransactionReporting/token(for:)] method, it returns JSON data as a Base64URL-encoded string. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/marketplacekit/reporting-transactions-for-core-technology-commission].
title: coreTechnology
